claudeResult.resultText: The dashboard rendered successfully — the canvas tab just isn't connected for a visual snapshot. Open http://localhost:7812/?session=42df4e68-5c4d-4f6c-bbfa-85bb171e1ccd to view it: a KPI row (Build Pass Rate 94%, Avg Build Time 4m12s, Open Incidents 2) above a two-column grid with the build-duration bar chart and deploy-count line chart, both Mon–Sun.
